creator: sshutdownow@gmail.com
text:
I'm runninin 8.0-RELEASE-p1, problem still exists.
This release is very strange indeed: when 8.0 released problem has appeared
- acpi_asus starts crash at boot, but before in current it has worked just
fine. It seems that many problems have return in release.

2010/1/2 Jim Crigler <thecrig@bellsouth.net>

> Is there any news on this PR?  I have the identical problem when running
> the 8.0 release.  Currently I'm booting kernel.prev, a copy of
> 8.0-CURRENT-200905, which works very well.  My wireless setup has wlan0
> attached to iwn0.  I will gladly supply any data requested.  Thanks.
>
> --
> Jim Crigler                         http://handsfreedevice.blogspot.com/
>  Ponder this:
>    Why do airlines call flights nonstop?  Don't they all stop
>    eventually?
>
